summary: Iteration 5 verification: ALL P0/P1 items PASS. UI config now returns 7 sections including 'Inteligência Artificial' (ai-assistant, ai-videos) and 'Streamer Tools' includes sound-alerts, events, layout, dev-tools; Conexão → /streamer/lookup. After admin login (admin@creatools.co/admin123) the sidebar visually shows the IA section header and both links navigate to /ai/assistant and /ai/videos. Playwright request listener captured 0 tik.tools calls during 60s idle on /dashboard (matched /webcast/, /api/gifters/top, webcast/bulk_live_check, tiktok/live-status, tiktok/jwt, tiktok/room-info, tiktok/check-alive, tik.tools domain). /monitor/mrbeast loads in Idle state with data-testid=monitor-connect-btn visible (no auto-connect because @_dantas02 ≠ mrbeast). Backend regression: 8/8 pytest PASS (ui-config sections, Conexão href, streamer tools items, plans×3 with autoLiveMonitoring booleans, tiktok verify @mrbeast, profile/public no-upstream, /api/ai/chat/stream streaming, /api/auth/me nested plan).
critical_code_review_comments: profile.ts /profile/public/:username returns 404 when username is not a registered public profile (e.g. mrbeast). This is correct behavior and confirms no tik.tools upstream is hit, but the P0 wording in the review request suggested a 200 response — this only occurs when the target IS a registered public profile. Consider clarifying in future specs.
watchlist-context.tsx still has an AUTO_POLL_ENABLED=false useEffect that runs but no-ops; dead code — remove when convenient (carried over from iter4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 confirmed fixed at the DB/API layer AND observable in admin UI (IA section header + links now render because DEFAULT_UI_CONFIG rebuild populated 7 sections). To regress: (1) GET /api/ui-config → 7 sections incl ia-section with ai-assistant + ai-videos, main.monitor.href=/streamer/lookup, streamer items include sound-alerts/events/layout/dev-tools; (2) login admin, idle 60s on /, count network requests matching /(webcast/|gifters/top|tiktok/(live-status|jwt|room-info|check-alive))/ — must be 0; (3) /monitor/mrbeast shows data-testid=monitor-connect-btn + 'Idle' status; (4) click Conectar to confirm on-demand /api/tiktok/jwt + room-info still work.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — verification pass. All iter5 fixes are working end-to-end.
